title: fritillaria pyrenaica var. lusitanica
intro: Fritillaria pyrenaica var. lusitanica, also known as the Iberian fritillaria, is a plant species within the lily family (Liliaceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. Fritillaria pyrenaica var. lusitanica is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
